brief_html: This message reserves a number of slots for concurrent NLS checking operations. No other NLS checking messages can be sent before this message has been sent.This message cannot be sent more than once per connection.
remarks_html:
This message reserves a number of slots for concurrent NLS checking operations. No other NLS checking messages can be sent before this message has been sent.This message cannot be sent more than once per connection.

BNLS may limit the number of slots to a reasonable value.
